temporary_badge.name: Temporary Badge
temporary_badge.description: A D.A.S.H. visitor badge. Valid 24 hours. Smells like warm laminate. My name is slightly misspelled.

paper_cup.name: Paper Cup
paper_cup.description: Government-issue paper cup. It's thinner than a campaign promise.

cup_of_water.name: Cup of Water
cup_of_water.description: A paper cup full of lukewarm water. It's not coffee, but it's honest work.

lost_cat_flyer.name: Lost Cat Flyer
lost_cat_flyer.description: Missing: Patches. Orange tabby. Last seen in the server room, B2 level. If found, contact Hal, ext. 1997. There's a crude drawing of the cat that's honestly kind of adorable.

faded_password_note.name: Faded Password Note
faded_password_note.description: A crumpled sticky note from the coat rack jacket. Partially legible: 'Srv rm pw: adm_n1___'. The rest is smudged beyond recognition.

umbrella.name: Umbrella
umbrella.description: A forgotten umbrella from the coat rack. It's one of those cheap collapsible ones that breaks the second it actually rains.

supply_closet_code.name: Supply Closet Code
supply_closet_code.description: A sticky note from Priya. '1-9-9-7.' The year the system was deployed. Of course it is.

laptop.name: Laptop
laptop.description: A brand new government-issue laptop, still in its plastic wrap. It's not a MacBook, but it'll compile code.
